return [{
  json: {
    ok: true,
    send: false,
    dry_run: true,
    reason: 'dry_run',
    cid: $json.cid,
    send_user_id: $json.send_user_id,
    send_message: $json.send_message,
    risk: $json.risk,
    risk_reason: $json.risk_reason,
    rule_reply: $json.rule_reply,
    reply: $json.reply,
    sanitized_reply: $json.sanitized_reply,
    final_reply: $json.final_reply,
    openclaw_reply_source: $json.openclaw_reply_source,
  },
}];
